blocks.text: had read something in Mills. Not enough to be certain — but enough to note.
gave Mills the benefit of the doubt. She was reading the scene carefully. That was worth something.
kept his read on Mills for now.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Including the door. The glass. The shape you saw at 9:51.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: He's filing it as suspicious death pending tox.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: We were supposed to leave today.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Davenport asked us to stay. As possible witnesses.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: As possible witnesses. Of course he did.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: We were the only people outside the house during the relevant window.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You mean you've been awake with this all night.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: And you're going to keep going, aren't you.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: I know the door was locked from the inside. I know that man was at dinner laughing at nine o'clock and dead by midnight. And I know I saw something at 9:51 that I cannot explain any other way.

blocks.prompt: Mara hears everything he just said. What does she do?

options.label: "That's not enough. You know it isn't enough."
She goes quiet. She knows he's right.
